content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-13, SecureField present) but demo credentials and review notes are placeholders: demo_user.txt = "test", demo_password.txt = "changeme", notes.txt = "TBD".
Pierre: Apple's reviewer must be able to log in and reach core features immediately, or the app will be rejected as incomplete per 2.1. Here the credentials are literal placeholder strings and the notes field just says "TBD", giving no working account or guidance. Replace these with a real, active demo account and notes describing how to reach any gated features (or add a demo mode if credentials can't be shared).
